mentions.note: Networking play; up 41% since March bottom. Fiber optics vs. copper transition; 'personal favorite' of Cramer. Shortages and sold-out products dominate buyer behavior.
Networking play; up 49% since March 30; part of AI data center rally but showing parabolic behavior warrant caution.
Networking play; part of big three with Ciena and Cisco; strong positioning in data center buildout.
Data-center connectivity specialist; bullish bet on machines talking to each other in cloud infrastructure.
Networking equipment for data centers; critical infrastructure player.
Beat earnings but stock -13.6% for not raising guidance due to supply constraint; having more demand than supply for multiple years is high-quality problem; CEO Jayshree Ullal will solve.
Data center networking play; one of only handful dominant in data center networking space alongside Cisco and Ciena.
